name: Pure Di Olive Nere (Black Olive Paste)
recipeIngredient: Grated zest and juice of 1 lemon
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender or food processor.
2. Blend until smooth, or leave chunky as desired.
3. Allow the paste to mellow for several hours before serving.
4. Store in a tightly covered container filled with olive oil and refrigerated. It will keep for weeks.
5. Use in other dishes or as part of an antipasto.
NOTE: Use black olives such as Italian Gaeta, French Vall'Aurea, or French Nicoise, all pitted.
